text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Fuji Kiseki will face the Asahi Hai F.S., her
first G1 race, and I'm a nervous wreck. Seeing
this, she leads me through some breathing
exercises.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her soothing presence helps me feel calmer in no
time. She promises to do well in the race, then
goes off to prove it.
